personal.name: Siva Shanmuga Vadivel
personal.bio: Every line of code reflects a journey of growth. Building not just a career, but a life shaped by struggles and progress.

seo.title: Siva Shanmuga Vadivel
seo.description: Personal portfolio, blog, gallery and videos.

hero.headline: SIVA SHANMUGA VADIVEL
hero.subtext:
Bridging real-world systems and digital experiences.
Simple. Practical. Meaningful.

about.heading: Hey there! Nice to meet you
paragraphs: I enjoy building things that people can actually use and feel.From industrial systems to modern web experiences, my journey has always been about connecting ideas with real-world impact.
I like keeping things simple, solving meaningful problems, and constantly learning along the way.
Outside of work, I capture moments, explore new places, and occasionally get lost in thoughts that turn into ideas.
bioParagraphs: I started my journey in industrial automation, working closely with real-world systems, machines, and control logic. That experience shaped how I think — structured, practical, and problem-driven.

Over time, I found myself drawn toward building digital experiences — where logic meets creativity. What started as curiosity turned into a passion for crafting clean, interactive, and user-friendly interfaces.
Today, I enjoy working at the intersection of hardware and software — combining engineering thinking with modern web technologies to build solutions that are both functional and meaningful.
Outside of work, I spend my time exploring photography, creating content, and learning something new every day.
about.ctaSubtext: I'm always open to new opportunities and collaborations.

journey.org: Chennova Software Pvt. Ltd. (Client: Continental Tires)
journey.desc: Leading PLC-to-enterprise integration and TIGER rollout across production machines. Implemented OPC UA and Modbus communication, developed machine logic (heartbeat, recipe handling), and supported commissioning, testing, and live plant troubleshooting.
highlights: Led TIGER rollout across 12+ production machines
Implemented OPC UA and Modbus TCP/IP communication protocols
Developed heartbeat monitoring and recipe handling logic
Supported live plant commissioning and on-site troubleshooting
Collaborated with cross-functional teams across USA and India

journey.desc: Developed industrial software platforms integrating PLC systems with .NET applications using OPC UA. Built PLC code-generation tools, designed web-based configuration systems, and deployed solutions using Docker for smart manufacturing environments.
highlights: Built PLC code-generation tools for faster deployment
Designed web-based configuration systems for machine setup
Integrated PLC systems with .NET applications via OPC UA
Developed internal dashboards with React and Node.js

journey.desc: Worked on control panel design, PLC programming, and HMI/SCADA development. Handled commissioning and servicing of industrial systems including furnace automation projects.
highlights: Designed and wired industrial control panels
Programmed PLCs for furnace automation projects
Developed HMI/SCADA interfaces for process monitoring
Handled on-site commissioning and system servicing

journey.desc: Focused on industrial automation, control systems, and PLC-based applications. Completed training in industrial automation and electrical systems.

356.name: India
356.note: Home country — explored from the southern tip to the northern plains.

840.name: United States
840.note: Lived and worked in Illinois. Snowfall, open highways, and the endless midwest sky.

hometown.label: Where My Roots Are
hometown.heading: Kangayam
hometown.subtext: A small town in Tamil Nadu, India
hometown.description: Kangayam is a town and taluk headquarters in Tiruppur district of Tamil Nadu, India. Nestled at the foothills of the Western Ghats, it is renowned for the indigenous Kangayam cattle breed and its rich agricultural heritage. The town blends rural charm with a deep sense of community, surrounded by lush farmlands, coconut groves, and temple architecture that echoes centuries of Dravidian culture. It's a place where simplicity meets resilience — the spirit that shaped who I am today.

items.title: My Cheetu
items.desc: Cheetu focuses on providing clarity and simplicity, ensuring users always know their financial status within the chit group. The app is designed for users who want a hassle-free way to manage their chit fund involvement without confusion. Whether you are a member or participant, Cheetu helps you stay on track with all your chit-related activities.

items.title: Financial IQ
items.desc: An AI-powered personal finance app that tracks expenses, analyzes spending, optimizes loans and credit cards, and provides smart insights to improve your financial health.
